prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic vertical smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, showing a text-to-image generation workflow for a Chinese ancient palace portrait.

Canvas: 9:16 vertical phone screenshot, black background, approximately 640 × 1136 px. Use rounded UI cards, small sans-serif interface text, and iOS-style spacing. No phone frame, just the app screen.

Layout: At the top center, place one large dark-gray rounded user message bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in white text. Below it, aligned left, place a small status line reading “Thought for 1m 8s ›”. Under that, place one generated image card with rounded corners, portrait orientation, positioned left of center. Beneath the image card, place a row of exactly 5 small interface icons: copy/share-style icon, thumbs up, thumbs down, regenerate/loop arrow, and ellipsis. At the bottom, place one rounded input bar with a plus icon on the left, placeholder Chinese text, a “deep thinking” control with a dropdown, a microphone icon, and one circular voice button on the right. Include the small footer text centered below the input bar.

Top message text: Use the following Chinese text inside the user bubble, preserving line wrapping naturally: 生成一张 9:16 竖版、高清度真实摄影质感的明艳华贵古风女性写真，画面主体是一位 20-28 岁年轻成年东方女性，成年气质明确，不过度欧美化，不幼态化。她拥有明艳东方浓颜，脸型柔和流畅，眉眼存在感强，眼神明亮自信，鼻型秀气，唇色为低饱和朱红，妆容完整精致，额间有细致花钿，整体明艳、华贵、贵气、自信，有古偶女主正式登场的存在感。\n\n场景设定在华丽宫廷回廊中，金色廊柱与红金雕塑形成庄重的古风空间层次，远处宫灯被浅景深柔和虚化，背景华丽但不抢人物主体。人物在帷幔旁短暂停步，身体轻微侧向镜头，肩颈舒展，一手轻扶金色刺绣披帛，另一只手自然垂落，眼神稳定地看向镜头，表情端正克制而有力量。\n\n她穿着朱红色底风大袖衫，衣袖宽大，衣料厚实有垂坠感，金色刺绣沿领口、袖缘、披帛边缘和束腰腰封展开。金色刺绣披帛从肩臂一侧自然垂落，与大袖形成华丽流动线条；刺绣腰封结构稳定，勾勒华服层次。整体配色为朱红、暖金与珍珠白，红色明艳但不过饱和，金色作为刺绣、发饰、珠宝和披帛边缘的高光，避免婚庆感，保持高级古风女主质感。\n\n镜头采用大半身近景，主体居中，浅景深，人物脸部、妆容、头饰、眼神、腰封、大袖衫和披帛层次都清晰可见。明亮柔光从侧前方照亮脸部、肩颈、华服刺绣和珠玉头饰，轻微暗边光勾出披帛与衣袖边缘，珠宝和金饰有克制高光。整体采用明亮华贵古风滤镜，画面通透，肤色自然，暗部干净，红金色彩统一，具有东方幻想古偶角色海报完成度。

Generated image content: The generated card shows a photorealistic young adult East Asian woman, 20-28 years old, standing in a lavish imperial palace corridor. She wears an ornate vermilion red, warm gold, and pearl white ancient Chinese-inspired gown with wide sleeves, gold embroidery, a structured embroidered waist belt, and a pale embroidered draped shawl. Her styling includes black hair in an elaborate updo, a large golden floral crown-like hair ornament, dangling earrings, a small forehead ornament, refined red lip makeup, bright confident eyes, and a calm frontal gaze. The palace background contains golden pillars, red drapery, warm lantern bokeh, and shallow depth of field. The portrait is vertically cropped from head to below the waist, with soft cinematic lighting and polished realistic photography texture.

Image card UI details: The generated image has exactly 2 overlay controls: white Chinese text “编辑” at the lower-left corner and a small circular share/download icon at the lower-right corner. The image card corners are rounded and the card casts no visible shadow against the black chat background.

Bottom UI text: The input placeholder reads 有问题，尽管问. The footer reads “ChatGPT 也可能会犯错。请核查重要信息。”

Visual style: Authentic ChatGPT mobile dark theme screenshot, black background, charcoal message bubble, white Chinese text, minimal gray interface icons, realistic generated photo thumbnail. Keep the composition clean and vertically spaced like a real app screen.

Constraints: Show exactly 1 user prompt bubble, 1 thought status line, 1 generated portrait image, 5 action icons under the image, 1 bottom input bar, and 2 overlay controls on the generated image. Do not add extra chat messages, watermarks, browser chrome, or unrelated UI panels.
